judge_reason: Description A states text is illegible and reversed, while Description B quotes specific, legible, reversed text from a blue stamp, creating a direct contradiction on the visual content of the stamp text.
original_image_tags: This document appears to be a single page of aged, off-white paper with visible creases and two punch holes at the top. The text is largely illegible, faded, and reversed (mirrored), indicating it may be a carbon copy or seen through from the other side. A prominent blue ink stamp is visible in the lower-left quadrant. Handwritten notations are present in red ink at the bottom right.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned blank-looking page with faint mirrored typed text, two black punch holes at the top, and several faded stamps near the bottom including blue “RECEIVED F.B.I. U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE” and a red date stamp.*
